narrative:
Green 4-D (precinct in Summit County) has 921 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.8%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.7 percentage points.
